name: Maple Pecan Mincemeat Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the tempeh for 20 minutes, then shred or dice finely.
2. Stir the shredded tempeh into the remaining ingredients in a large saucepan.
3. Bring to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and set aside to cool.
5. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
6. Combine all pie crust ingredients until a soft dough forms. Add more orange juice if necessary.
7. Divide the dough into two pieces; one should be slightly larger than the other.
8. Place the larger ball of dough on a lightly floured surface and roll out to a 9-inch circle (about 23 cm).
9. Transfer the rolled dough to an 8-inch pie plate.
10. Spoon the cooled filling mixture into the pie crust.
11. Roll out the remaining dough piece and place it on top of the filling.
12. Seal and crimp the edges, then bake for 10 minutes at 400°F (200°C).
13. Reduce the heat to 325°F (165°C) and continue baking until the crust is lightly browned, about 30 minutes.
14. Allow to cool before serving.
